description:
Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder

Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder
Full release notes:
https://www.dyad.sh/docs/releases/0.44.0
What's Changed
- Increase auto-update check interval from 10 minutes to 60 minutes by @wwwillchen in #3194
- fix: resolve AI_MissingToolResultsError after mid-turn compaction by @wwwillchen in #3213
- Feature/pause queue by @nourzakhama2003 in #3077
- Plan: Nitro Server Layer Support for Vite Projects by @azizmejri1 in #3090
- Neon integration by @azizmejri1 in #3178
- End turn with set chat summary by @wwwillchen in #3241
- fix: make refactor button tooltip show full file path by @RyanGroch in #3237
- Bump to v0.44.0-beta.1 by @wwwillchen in #3243
- Display version in ChatMessage UI by @nourzakhama2003 in #3191
- Add deflake-e2e-from-run skill by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3247
- Deflake sendPrompt E2E helper against Lexical/jotai chat-switch races by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3246
- ci: allowlist bot authors for e2e tests by @wwwillchen in #3248
- Neon: banner for custom email provider in production by @wwwillchen in #3245
- Persist chat mode per chat by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3249
- Adding password reset guide by @azizmejri1 in #3254
- fix: avoid excessive supabase requests to prevent rate limit by @RyanGroch in #3250
- fix: keep retry button visible when error popup appears by @nourzakhama2003 in #3231
- Fixing formatting issue in queryKeys.ts by @azizmejri1 in #3258
- Rebaseline e2e tests by @wwwillchen in #3259
- Changing preview branch endpoint to read-write by @azizmejri1 in #3257
- Allow local agent to inspect ignored files by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3256
- Pin claude code action to v1.0.96 b/c of anthropics/claude-code-action#1220 by @wwwillchen in #3261
- Keep local agent running after chat summary by @wwwillchen in #3260
- Update E2E deflake workflow verification by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3262
- App screenshot by @azizmejri1 in #3134
- test: adds search-replace evaluation suite by @RyanGroch in #3205
- Handle cross-app references in a scalable way by @azizmejri1 in #3219
- Fix presubmit failures in eval suite fixtures and helpers by @azizmejri1 in #3286
- refactor(migration):install drizzle-kit in user app instead of bundling by @azizmejri1 in #3280
- Surface shared Supabase deploy output in local agent by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3288
- Queue Supabase edge function deploys by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3289
- Bump to v0.44.0-beta.2 by @wwwillchen in #3292
- Bump to v0.44.0 by @wwwillchen in #3300
- docs: fix inaccuracies in rule files from weekly review by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3271
- Split closed-issue-comment workflow by commenter identity by @wwwillchen in #3270
- Rebase set_chat_summary tool description by @wwwillchen in #3293
- mask api key in settings ui by @nourzakhama2003 in #3274
- Add Codex PR review workflow by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3303
- fix: omit default temperature for custom models by @wwwillchen in #3301
- Add setting to keep app previews running forever by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3273
- remove edit_file tool from pro agent by @RyanGroch in #3268
Full Changelog: v0.43.0...v0.44.0
